archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) mixed with Industrial Control Panel Neo-Brutalism
rationale: A dorm washing machine app needs to be highly utilitarian, urgently clear, and free from corporate SaaS fluff. A high-contrast 'Industrial Control Panel' style with brutalist roots elevates the strict 'Green=Available, Red=Booked' requirement into a deliberate design choice rather than an afterthought. It speaks to Gen Z dorm residents through its stark, anti-design aesthetic.

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen border-x-0 sm:border-x-2 border-border bg-background relative
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous inner padding (p-4 to p-6) but tight margins between related functional blocks to mimic a dashboard.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). 2px thick solid borders in light mode for the brutalist effect, 1px subtle borders in dark mode.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Neo-Brutalist hard shadows: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] (Light) or shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(244,244,240,0.2)] (Dark). No blurry soft dropshadows.

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b-2 border-border p-4 flex justify-between items-center
header.elements: Brand logo (Text H3), User Profile Indicator, Light/Dark Toggle icon button.

day_selector.style: flex overflow-x-auto gap-2 p-4 border-b-2 border-border hide-scrollbar
day_selector.item_active: bg-primary text-primary-text border-2 border-primary px-4 py-2 font-bold
day_selector.item_inactive: bg-transparent text-text border-2 border-border px-4 py-2 font-mono text-sm hover:bg-surface transition-colors

time_slot.container: grid grid-cols-[80px_1fr] gap-4 p-4 border-b border-border/50 items-center
time_slot.available_card: flex justify-between items-center bg-green-500 text-black p-4 border-2 border-transparent transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 cursor-pointer active:translate-y-0
time_slot.booked_card: flex justify-between items-center bg-red-500 text-white p-4 border-2 border-transparent
time_slot.booked_by_me_card: flex justify-between items-center bg-red-900 text-white p-4 border-2 border-red-500

buttons.primary: w-full bg-primary text-primary-text font-bold uppercase tracking-wider py-4 border-2 border-transparent hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: w-full bg-surface text-text font-bold uppercase tracking-wider py-4 border-2 border-border hover:bg-border/10
buttons.cancel: bg-transparent border-2 border-white text-white px-3 py-1 text-sm font-bold uppercase hover:bg-white hover:text-red-900
buttons.queue: bg-white text-red-600 px-3 py-1 text-sm font-bold uppercase hover:bg-gray-100

modals.overlay: fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-end sm:items-center justify-center p-4
modals.content: w-full max-w-sm bg-background border-2 border-border p-6 shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] (or dark equivalent) animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-4

forms.input: w-full bg-surface border-2 border-border p-4 font-mono text-lg text-text focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent placeholder:text-text/40 rounded-none

icons.usage: Use bold/duotone weights. Icons should feel mechanical and purposeful (e.g., Arrows, Clocks, Sun/Moon, User). No decorative fluff.

animation_and_interactions.hover: Hard translates (e.g., hover:-translate-y-1 hover:translate-x-1) with sharp shadows to emphasize physicality.
animation_and_interactions.transitions: Fast, mechanical duration (150ms). Avoid slow, elastic easing.
animation_and_interactions.toast: Use Sonner library with custom unstyled mode to match the sharp-edged, high-contrast brutalist design.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='slot-0900-book', data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind using the colors and typography described above. Override Shadcn's default soft radius by setting --radius to 0px in globals.css.
2. Implement a simple mobile-first layout. The entire app should ideally render inside a max-w-md container centered on desktop to emulate a mobile app.
3. Build the Login View: A simple screen with a massive WASHSLOT header, a text input for the name, and a brutalist enter button.
4. Build the Timetable View: Sticky header with user details and theme toggle. A horizontal scroll for Days (Mon-Sun). A vertical list for 24 time slots.
5. Slot States: Ensure clear visual distinction between Available (Green) and Booked (Red). Use Tailwind's emerald-500 and red-500.
6. Booking Flow: Clicking an available slot opens a bottom-sheet or modal asking for 1h or 2h duration. Confirming books it.
7. Queue/Waitlist: If a slot is booked by someone else, show a 'Join Queue' button inside the slot block.
8. Cancel: If a slot is booked by the current user, show a 'Cancel' button.
9. Use Lucide or Phosphor icons, but sparingly. The design should rely heavily on typography and color blocks.
10. Ensure the theme toggle actually switches Tailwind's 'dark' class on the document root.
11. State management should be robust (likely React context or simple hooks passing to FastAPI backend). Do not use mock states if backend is available.
